findings.problem: SQL injection via string interpolation in getUserPosts userId parameter
SQL injection in createUser — body.name and body.email concatenated into query
findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries; validate and sanitize input

findings.problem: Empty catch block swallows database errors in createUser
findings.recommendation: Log error and rethrow or return structured error to caller

findings.problem: N+1 query pattern — loads author per post in loop
findings.recommendation: Batch fetch authors with WHERE id IN (...) or JOIN

findings.problem: Off-by-one loop uses i <= order.items.length causing undefined access
processOrder is a 35-line nested conditional — hard to test and maintain
findings.recommendation: Extract pricing, tax, shipping, coupon into small pure functions

findings.problem: No tests for api.js or utils.js — only smoke test exists
findings.recommendation: Add unit tests for SQL-safe queries, error paths, and processOrder edge cases

findings.problem: legacyFormatter is exported but never imported — dead code
findings.recommendation: Remove export or wire up usage after confirming no external deps

findings.problem: lodash@4.17.15 has known prototype pollution CVE — outdated dependency
findings.recommendation: Upgrade lodash to latest 4.17.21+ or remove if unused

findings.problem: Fake query returns raw SQL string in result — misleading stub for production
findings.recommendation: Use in-memory fixture or mark module as test-only
